response.original_title: TRADITIO I: A Work of Faith
response.overview: Produced over a period of two years, from June 2024 to May 2026, the project was carried out by two young students from Switzerland and Germany in collaboration with the General House of the SSPX. TRADITIO consists of three feature-length films with a total running time of more than four hours. It is the largest and most ambitious film project ever undertaken by the Priestly Society of Saint Pius X.  The first film focuses on the Catholic priesthood, the history of the SSPX, and priestly formation in its international seminaries.
response.tagline: The Life and Ministry of the Catholic Priest
response.title: TRADITIO I: A Work of Faith
